import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in xs
    if not inserted and x <= y
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut numbers: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  else if b == 45 and not has
    neg = true
  else
    if has
      if neg
        numbers = list.push(numbers, -cur)
      else
        numbers = list.push(numbers, cur)
      end
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has
  if neg
    numbers = list.push(numbers, -cur)
  else
    numbers = list.push(numbers, cur)
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in numbers
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
